day_start: ^Hey man! Ready to start the day? I heard that there's gonna be a student org fair today at Gordon's if you wanted to check it out with me later.
^I also think there's some greek life recruiting... thing... over at Library Mall too.
^I dunno. I gotta go so, I'll see ya later!
object_bed: ^I probably shouldn't go back to sleep first thing in the morning...

c-0: ^Hmm... I have a reading due today... a quiz due tomorrow... and a project due on Friday.

c-0: ^You grab it and bring it to your mouth. There's a funky smell eminating from it. After taking a swig, your tummy gurgles. It leave a weird taste in your mouth.

breakfast_sandwich: ^You're eyeing up that breakfast sammie... it looks delicious, and... oops...! Somehow, it's found its way into your hand... the barista stares at you... and now... somehow that sandwich made its way into your mouth... How did that happen? The barista is shakes their head at you as you inhale the sandwich, but who cares?
cash_register: ^"Nope! Don't even THINK about it. Only I have access to the register... my sweet..."
cheese_club_president: ^"Hey hey HEY! Over here! Have you ever heard of the UW Cheese Club? Yes, we're as great as it sounds!"
^"There's sooo many things we do! "We go on cheese curd crawls around Madison, eat lots of cheesy snacks... talk about how much we love cheese...
^Not that we don't get on top of cheesy business too! The Vice President and I even went to a World Championship Cheese Content last week!
^I KNOW you're intrigued! You should DEFINITELY come to our first meeting tomorrow at College Library! We'll have a variety of cheese snacks!!
^We need as many people to come to this event... we spent WAY TOO MUCH MONEY on all this cheese...
^See ya tomorrow alright?! Don't forget about it! Brie there!
roommate_gordons: ^"Hey! You made it! Any of these clubs sound interesting to you?"
^"Low key... cheese club is kinda calling my name... like... free cheese? How could any Wisconsinite say no to that?!"
^"But there's also Animation Club... Club Water Polo... Sports Business... Robotics... Larping... Fashion... Smash Bros... there's WAY too much to choose from!"
^"If only they didn't all meet on Wednesdays at 7PM..."

spike_ball_setup: ^Ah yes, the classic Gordon's Lawn collegiate sport. Spike Ball.
